---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for StyleSense
title: "feat: "
labels: ["enhancement", "needs-triage"]
assignees: []
---

## Summary

<!-- One sentence: what do you want StyleSense to do that it doesn't do today? -->

## Problem / Motivation

<!-- What problem does this solve? Who is affected and how often? -->

## Proposed Solution

<!-- Describe your preferred solution. Be as specific as possible. -->

## Alternatives Considered

<!-- List any alternative solutions or features you considered, and why you ruled them out. -->

## User Impact

<!-- Who benefits from this? (e.g. all users, free tier only, admin users) -->

## Additional Context

<!-- Mockups, screenshots, links to similar features in other products. -->
